subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O Muhammad, inasmuch as thou hast rent asunder the veils and attained unto the lights of the countenance of thy Lord, the Mighty, the All-Bestowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک یا محمد بما خرقت الاحجاب و فزت بانوار وجه ربک العزیز الوهاب انه من
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @praise and encouragement
